desc_ja: この池では毎年大ザリガニ釣り大会を開催。年々数は減ってきているが、まだたくさん生息している。
desc_en: A big crayfish fishing tournament is held at this pond every year. Although the number of crayfish is decreasing year by year there are still many living there.

desc_ja: 中央公園内の沢にザリガニ。全体的に大きな個体。メダカなどの在来種もいる。
desc_en: Crayfish were found there. They were generally large individuals. Native species such as medaka fish is also present.

name_ja: 都南大橋 高架下の浅瀬
name_en: Shallow waters under the elevated bridge of Tonan Ohashi
desc_ja: 都南大橋の浅瀬（橋の柱）に大きくて綺麗な個体のアメリカザリガニが生息。長めの竿が必要。
desc_en: Large beautiful American crayfish inhabit the shallow waters (around the bridge pillars) of the Tonan Ohashi Bridge. A long fishing rod is necessary.
place_ja: M55C+RG 盛岡市、岩手県、日本

name_ja: 小岩井農場植木植物園
desc_en: They inhabit the water areas within the park.

name_ja: 紫波城古代公園の水路
name_en: Waterway in Shiwa Castle Ancient Park
desc_ja: 小型個体が多くハサミも小型な個体が多い
desc_en: Many of these individuals are small and many also have small claws.
place_ja: M4M3+WG 盛岡市、岩手県、日本

desc_ja: 標準的なサイズのザリガニがいます。ススキなどイネ科植物付近でよく取れます。
desc_en: There are standard-sized crayfish here. They are often found near grasses such as Japanese pampas grass.
place_en: Takamatsu Pond 1-chōme-26-1 Takamatsu Morioka Iwate 020-0114 Japan
place_ja: 〒020-0114 岩手県盛岡市高松1丁目26-1 高松池

desc_ja: 水田の小さな用水路にザリガニ。全体的に小さな個体が多い。水流がそこまでない。
desc_en: Crayfish in a small irrigation ditch in a rice paddy. Most of them are small. The water flow is not very strong.

name_en: Morioka City Nagai Irrigation Canal A
desc_ja: この近辺に大量に生息している可能性アリ。過去数年で見かける回数は増えた。
desc_en: There's a possibility that a large number of them inhabit this area. I've seen them more often in the past few years.
place_ja: 〒020-0834 岩手県盛岡市長井地割-34 11

name_en: The pond at the Central Community Center
desc_ja: ネットにも情報が載っている。中津川に流れ込む部分にもいる可能性がある。
desc_en: Information is also available online. There's a possibility they're present in the part of the river that flows into the Nakatsugawa River.
